hypothesis: Annealing the XRD objective from a heavily broadened, coarsely binned pattern to the true instrumental resolution during gradient descent (i.e., a multi-scale convolutional continuation) will reduce spurious local minima arising from peak birth/death and yield higher ground-truth match rates than any fixed-resolution similarity metric for recovering structures under lattice distortions up to σl≈0.1 and coordinate noise up to σc≈0.05.
